name: 10 x CentiSpace-1
location_str: Haiyang offshore launch location @ Haiyang Oriental Spaceport, CHN
description: Chinese commercial small satellites by Beijing-based company Future Navigation for providing GNSS augmentation signals services from LEO. They are part of a planned 160 satellites constellation.
rocket_fact: Launch pad water deluge systems are primarily used for sound suppression to prevent acoustic waves from tearing the rocket apart.
next_name: Daughter Of The Stars (LEO-PNT Pathfinder A)
